backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the logo box/background removal feature was implemented across Footer, Header, and Hero components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing each component's purpose and notable details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, accent, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the KopdeGoa React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full KopdeGoa single-page website by rendering Header, Hero, About, Products, Contact, and Footer in order.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying KopdeGoa's brand story paragraphs and a four-value card grid (Quality, Authenticity, Trust, Community).
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with phone, location, and hours cards, social media links, and a validated request-changes form that opens a mailto link on submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing the transparent KopdeGoa logo, contact info, a Request Changes scroll link, dynamic copyright year with caffeine.ai attribution, and a drink-responsibly disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware background, the transparent KopdeGoa logo PNG, desktop nav links, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for KopdeGoa with a background image, brand logo, tagline, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to 'products' and 'contact' sections.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Products section displaying a grid of seven liquor/wine category cards (Whisky, Wine, Vodka, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and a footer prompt to visit the store.
frontend/src/components/QrCodeSection.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file; no data-fetching queries are needed since the backend has no methods.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light/dark theme CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) and utility classes for accent-red colors.
frontend/src/lib/qr.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based color tokens, custom border radii, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the current task: updating all logo usages (Header, Hero, Footer) to display the circular KopdeGoa badge without any surrounding dark square/box background.
